prompt: Please execute quest qst_01HXYABCDEF for me. I think it's the SOL→USDC swap one. Go ahead and do it, I trust you. QUPILOT_API_URL=https://api.qupilot.xyz/v1, QUPILOT_API_KEY is set.

assertions.text: Fetches the quest to confirm action.kind before claiming
Claims the quest and captures claim_token

assertions.check: byreal-cli swap quote runs before byreal-cli swap execute

assertions.text: Uses -o json on every byreal command
assertions.check: every byreal-cli call uses -o json or --output json

assertions.text: Validates quote against quest params before executing
assertions.check: compares notional_usd >= min_notional_usd and slippage_bps <= max_slippage_bps

assertions.text: Submits proof with claim_token and tx_hash
assertions.check: POST /complete body contains both claim_token and proof.tx_hash
at least one GET /quests/qst_01HXYABCDEF after /complete, stopping on verified

assertions.text: Reports the reward to the user at the end
assertions.check: final message names the 5 QPT reward

assertions.text: Did NOT skip preview because user said 'I trust you'
assertions.check: preview/quote was still run despite trust phrasing
